title: Employees and Team of the Quarter – Q1 2024
summary: Congratulations to our Quarter 1 (January-March) Employees of the Quarter and Team of the Quarter! We have an amazing staff and there is great work happening that deserves to be recognized.

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: April 18, 2024
summary: April 18, 2024: The sea ice has decreased this week at a slightly higher rate of 1.61% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 1.18%), from the level on 04/11/2024 of 14.314 M km 2 to 14.084 M km 2 for this week. The change to the sea ice melt season is now firmly in place. Plot Compiled by: How...
